  "topics": "1.   "topic_details": "- Job Search: Transitioning to Content Marketing Strategist/Digital Marketing Consultant. Resume highlights: 50 hrs/week during peak, Google Analytics/HubSpot certs, social media growth metrics. Strategy: Hybrid approach (core version + tailored versions). - Work Schedule: 40-45 hr weeks. Buffer time strategies: padding, task grouping, overflow time. Off: Wed-Fri. - Aquarium: 20-gal tank. Fish: 10 neon tetras, 5 golden honey gouramis, pleco. Plants: Java Moss, Anacharis. Decor: Treasure chest 'city' area. Schooling fish: Lemon tetras/Zebra Danios. - Betta: Bubbles in 10-gal tank. Diet: Frozen bloodworms. - Las Vegas: Hilton Lake Las Vegas (Cat 5, ~40k pts). Alternatives: HGVC (Strip, suites), Waldorf Astoria (Cat 10, ~90-120k pts). - Paris: Nov trip. Budget $200-300. Hotels: Pullman (rooftop bar), Novotel (family-friendly), Hilton Paris Eiffel Tower (Executive Lounge, 50-60k pts). Breakfast: Pullman (full buffet), Hilton (made-to-order). - Gardening: Zip 23456 (Virginia Beach). Soil temp 48-52°F. Compost adds 1-2°F. Plants: Marigolds (started Mar 3), tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers. Support: Stakes/twine grid. - BBQ: Vegetarian options: Jackfruit sandwiches, tofu satay, portobello burgers. Korean BBQ: Bulgogi, galbi, gochujang marinade. Wood chips: Apple (fruity), Hickory (strong). Patio furniture: Wicker/Recycled plastic (Polywood/Hanover). - Remote Work: Virtual coffee breaks. Strategy: Collaborative suggestion, optional, clear expectations. - Gifts: Minimalist earrings ($80, Aurate/Mejuri/Catbird). Neighbor: $10 coffee gift card. Music: Portable speaker/subscription. - Six Flags: Coasters: Twisted Colossus, Full Throttle, West Coast Racers, X2. Single-rider lines. - Bereavement: 3-5 support sessions. Memory box: Grandmother's locket, recipe book, photos. - Fitness: Bodyweight exercises (squats/lunges form tips). Reading: 'Wild', 'Daring Greatly'. Meal prep: Lentil bolognese, roasted sweet potatoes (rosemary). - Tech: Power bank (Anker/Mophie). Backup: Google Drive 200GB plan. App org: Folders, widgets. - Collections: 17 vintage cameras (Brownie Hawkeye). Funko POPs (MCU). Vinyl: Fleetwood Mac Rumours (1978). Posters: Mondo Harry Potter. - Finances: Mint app. Cut Saks/Neiman, beauty box ($50/mo). $800 handbag expense. - Art: Met Greek/Roman (Euphiletos Cup, Temple of Dendur/Isis). Street Art: LA (Arts District, Shepard Fairey, Retna). Feminist Art: Rachel Lee exhibition. - Skincare: Sephora 300 pts. La Roche-Posay SPF 50. Laneige Time Freeze Essence (anti-aging). - Europe: US Visa-free (90/180 rule). Language: Spanish cognates help with French/German. Etiquette: France (bise, tipping), Germany (directness, shoes off). - Family History: 75% Euro/15% Afr/10% Native. Great-aunt: WWII refugee. Bricha movement. Emergency Quota Act 1944 (1k/month). - Fitness Playlists: BodyPump (Rock/Metal/Hip-Hop), Zumba (Latin/Pop), Hip Hop Abs (Hip-Hop). - Cat: Luna (9 months). Microchipping (Fri appt). Interactive toys (Petcube wall toy). Camera: Furbo/Petcube (treat dispense). - Moncayo: Hiking GR-90. Autumn visit. Rural cottage stay. - Podcasts: Hardcore History, Lore, StarTalk. - Italian: Seco de Cordero (Ancash lamb stew, Pilsner beer). Arroz con Leche. - Propaganda: Humor effectiveness, stereotypes. - Meal Prep: Quinoa/protein (lentil bolognese, sweet potatoes). - Granola: Customization (nuts, dried fruit, spices). - Cameras: Storage (65-70°F, 50% humidity). Display: Tiered shelves, glass cases. - Vinyl/Posters: Acid-free tubes, shadow boxes. - Budget: Mint, $800 handbag. - Art: Mixed media/Feminist recs. - Phone: Backup Google Drive 200GB. Charger Anker/Aukey. - Insurance: Trip cancellation/delay. - Airlines: Delta SkyMiles (Miami 10k pts). Citi AAdvantage Executive ($450 fee, 50k bonus). Europe hostels (Meininger, Generator). - Antiques: 1950s armchair, crystal chandelier care. Estate sale research. - Adoption: CA foster care. Home study (3-6 mos, $1.5-3k).   "recent_topic": "Content Calendar for Language Learning Project: User is starting a language learning/exchange project inspired by Facebook groups. Sample 4-week calendar created with specific post ideas (e.g., '5 Essential Apps', 'Cultural Immersion', 'Language Learner Interviews').",
  "user_profile": "User is a Digital Marketing Specialist transitioning to Content Marketing Strategist/Digital Marketing Consultant. Lives in Virginia Beach (23456). Has a cat named Luna (9 months).
